title: T-047 — Final Wave0 PRD v4.3 domain amendment: org_id scope, fg.* events, shared BOM SSOT, D365 posture
prompt:
# T-047 — Final Wave0 PRD v4.3 domain amendment: org_id scope, fg.* events, shared BOM SSOT, D365 posture

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §4, §5, §8, §10, §11, §13, §W0-v4.3
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
ACP import shape: top-level TaskCreate only (`title`, `prompt`, `labels`, `priority`, `max_attempts`, `pipeline_name`, `pipeline_inputs`). Do not add generated ACP fields such as task_id/status/project_id. `pipeline_inputs.root_path` is mandatory.

## Goal
Patch docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md to v4.3 with the locked Wave0 decisions so downstream implementation tasks stop relying on stale tenant_id/fa.* assumptions.

## Locked Wave 0 decisions to honor
- Business data-plane scope is `org_id`; do not create new business-table `tenant_id` columns. Tenant/control-plane concepts may exist above org scope, but app/business rows, RLS policies, audit/outbox rows, role grants, and R13 skeletons use `org_id`.
- Canonical finished-good domain/event prefix is `fg.*`. `fa.*` / `FA` may appear only as an explicit legacy compatibility alias during migration, never as the primary new contract.
- Use the safe non-spoofable org-context RLS pattern. Do not rely on unsafe direct custom GUC `SET` by app users. Do not declare `LEAKPROOF` unless the implementation proves it is valid and necessary.
- Lower numeric priority is picked sooner; dependencies must be local `T-XXX` IDs. Cross-module blockers, if any, belong in `pipeline_inputs.cross_module_dependencies` and in this prompt.
- Exactly one atomic task type: `T0-docs`.

## Implementation contract
Edit only `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md`. Bump front matter version/status/supersedes to v4.3. Add a clearly delimited `§W0-v4.3 — Wave0 readiness amendment (2026-05-03)` covering: `org_id` as canonical business/RLS scope; tenant/control-plane above org; `fg.*` canonical finished-good events with `fa.*`/FA legacy alias only; Brief -> NPD Project canonical flow and `convertBriefToFa` wrapper-only compatibility; FG/Product code selected at G3, not brief completion; shared BOM SSOT skeleton lives in Foundation; factory_spec/internal_product_spec foundation contract; D365 optional import/export/integration posture, never source of truth and export not factory release; Trial/Pilot/Handoff/Packaging evidence in NPD flow; sensory may be N/A unless org policy requires Technical read model; safe RLS org context pattern; ACP real task-shape notes. Add changelog entry and final footer v4.3.

## Files in scope
- docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md [modify]

## Dependencies
- None

## Cross-module dependencies
- None

## Acceptance criteria
1. Front matter says version 4.3 and supersedes v4.2.
2. The amendment explicitly contains all locked Wave0 decisions relevant to Foundation.
3. The PRD no longer states `fa.*` is canonical without an adjacent v4.3 correction to `fg.*`.
4. The PRD documents D365 as optional integration/posture only, not source of truth.

## Test strategy
- Run markdown grep checks for `version: 4.3`, `org_id`, `fg.*`, `Shared BOM SSOT`, and `D365`.
- Run `git diff -- docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` and verify only docs changed.

## Risk red lines
- Do not edit app code.
- Do not rewrite unrelated PRD sections beyond the amendment/changelog/front matter.
- Do not leave contradictory canonical `fa.*` wording unqualified.

## Closeout evidence
Provide changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status, deviations_from_prd, and git_status.
